svg.text: Bicep IaC · GitHub Actions CI/CD · OIDC Authentication · Environments: dev · test · prod
Application Gateway WAF v2 · Public IP
Inbound: Internet HTTPS (443) + HTTP (80) via Public IP
WAF: OWASP 3.2 · Bot Manager · SQLi / XSS rules
HTTP → HTTPS 301 redirect (Detection: dev/test · Prevention: prod)
All spoke egress → Internet routed via UDR (0.0.0.0/0 → Firewall private IP)
Threat Intelligence: Alert mode · Application + Network rule collections
Centralised egress point — inspect, log, and block outbound traffic
Azure Bastion Standard SKU · Native client SSH/RDP
Inbound: browser-based HTTPS tunnel (no public IP on VMs)
RDP (3389) + SSH (22) tunnelled to AdminSubnet VMs only
Standard SKU: native client tunnelling + shareable links
10.0.0.0/27 · VPN / ExpressRoute ready — not deployed in this phase
Reserved for future VPN Gateway or ExpressRoute connection
🔑 Key Vault (RBAC mode) — SSL certificate store for App Gateway HTTPS listener
🗺 Route Table (UDR) — default route 0.0.0.0/0 → Firewall private IP (spoke egress)
📊 Log Analytics Workspace — diagnostics for Firewall, Bastion, App Gateway, NSGs
🌐 Public IPs — App Gateway PIP (static Standard SKU) · Bastion PIP
Web tier — IIS · NGINX · App Service
✓ Allow AppGW health probes (65200-65535) from GatewayManager (priority 120)
Application tier — APIs · Microservices · Azure Functions
✓ Allow HTTP (80), HTTPS (443), App (8080, 8443) from WebSubnet only (priority 100)
Egress via UDR → Azure Firewall for outbound internet access
Data tier — Azure SQL · PostgreSQL · Cosmos DB
✓ Allow PostgreSQL (5432) from AppSubnet (priority 110) · Allow RDP (3389) from AdminSubnet (priority 120)
Management — jump servers · admin VMs · monitoring agents
Azure Resource Groups (9 total — 3 per environment)
Built with Azure Bicep · Deployed via GitHub Actions OIDC · github.com/sufideen/azcloudtrain01
